launch_inputs.research_brief: Assess how Agirunner should package first-party research workflows that combine uploaded evidence, provider-native search, and operator-visible deliverables for enterprise teams.
launch_inputs.decision_goal: Recommend which first-party research experience Agirunner should harden next and what evidence expectations make that recommendation credible.
launch_inputs.source_constraints: Prefer primary product sources, current documentation, and recent third-party analysis; call out hype, stale evidence, and unsupported claims explicitly.
